title: Ultimate Utilities
description: Utilities For Kubejs" is the essential core mod for our 1.18.2-1.20.1 modpack, necessary for our server to function properly. It provides key features and optimizations, ensuring stability and a better gaming experience. Without "Utilities," .
body:
![Ultimate Utilities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5fd59ffb6bda8d3e0ec9ea4117a6b1f41103e0a_0.webp)

[Ultimate Utilities] - KubeJS Addon

This KubeJS addon introduces a variety of new elements and adjustments to enhance gameplay on your server.

🔥 Key Features:



✅ New Foods – Custom food items to improve survival.
✅ New Tools – Unique equipment tailored for different situations.
✅ Removed Recipes – Certain Vanilla Minecraft recipes have been removed for better game balance.
✅ Mission Items – Special items designed to integrate into custom missions and challenges.



This mod is perfect for players looking for a more customized and challenging Minecraft experience. Explore, survive, and discover all the new features!


[![Imagen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4953413fc746ad893fc1c9369452d21cbd399e6b.png)](https://clankyhosting.com/cart.php?a=view&promocode=srnadien)
